schools.name: SMK University of Applied Sciences
schools.description: SMK University of Applied Sciences is the largest non-state higher education institution in Lithuania, offering modern, practical study programs. Known for its dynamic and innovative approach, it provides an excellent environment for international students to develop practical skills aligned with the global labor market.

schools.name: Vilnius University
schools.description: Established in 1579, Vilnius University is the oldest and largest university in Lithuania and one of the oldest in Central Europe. Consistently ranked among the top 400 universities globally, it offers world-class research facilities and a diverse community, making it a prestigious choice for international scholars.

schools.name: Kaunas University of Technology (KTU)
schools.description: Kaunas University of Technology (KTU) is one of the largest technological universities in the Baltics. Known for its strong links with business and industry, KTU offers extensive research opportunities, start-up incubators, and state-of-the-art laboratories, providing a hands-on learning experience.

schools.name: University of Warsaw
schools.description: The University of Warsaw is the largest university in Poland and consistently ranked as the best in the country. It offers a vibrant campus life in the heart of Warsaw, exceptional academic standards, and strong international partnerships, attracting top students from around the world.

schools.name: Vistula University
schools.description: Vistula University is a highly internationalized private university in Warsaw. It stands out for its practical approach to education, close cooperation with global corporations, and double degree programs. It is highly recommended for students seeking a business-oriented and modern learning environment.

schools.name: Jagiellonian University
schools.description: Founded in 1364, Jagiellonian University is Poland's oldest university and one of the most prestigious in Europe. Located in the historic city of Krakow, it offers a rich cultural experience and world-renowned academic programs, particularly in humanities, law, and medicine.

schools.name: RWTH Aachen University
schools.description: RWTH Aachen University is one of Germany's Elite Universities and a member of the IDEA League. It is globally recognized for its outstanding engineering and science programs. With no direct tuition fees (only an administrative semester fee), it offers highly affordable, world-class education.

schools.name: Technical University of Munich (TUM)
schools.description: The Technical University of Munich (TUM) is consistently ranked as the best university in Germany. Known as the 'Entrepreneurial University', it has produced numerous Nobel laureates and successful start-ups. It offers cutting-edge research facilities and strong industry connections in Bavaria.

schools.name: University of Tartu
schools.description: The University of Tartu is the national university of Estonia and the biggest and most prestigious university in the country. It ranks in the top 1% of the world's most-cited universities. Tartu is a vibrant student town, offering a unique academic atmosphere and strong IT and science programs.

schools.name: Tallinn University of Technology
schools.description: Tallinn University of Technology (TalTech) is the only technological university in Estonia. Known as the flagship of Estonian engineering and technology education, TalTech is a leader in digital solutions and cyber security. Its modern campus includes an innovation and business center.

schools.name: University of Latvia
schools.description: The University of Latvia is one of the largest and most comprehensive research universities in the Baltic States. Located in the beautiful capital city of Riga, it offers a wide range of study programs, excellent research opportunities, and an active international student community.

schools.name: Riga Technical University
schools.description: Riga Technical University (RTU) is the oldest technical university in the Baltics. It is renowned for its strong focus on engineering, technology, and applied sciences. RTU provides a highly practical education, closely aligned with industry needs and modern technological advancements.

housing.title: Premium Student Studio - Vilnius
housing.description: Fully furnished studio with high-speed internet and all utilities included.

housing.title: Shared Apartment - Warsaw
housing.description: Looking for a student flatmate. Near Vistula University.

housing.title: Modern Dorm Room - Berlin
housing.description: Private room in a modern student residence with gym access.

services.name: Visa Consultation
services.description: Step-by-step guidance for D-type national visas and residence permits.

services.name: Student Insurance
services.description: Schengen-compliant health insurance plans starting from €50/year.

services.name: Document Translation
services.description: Certified translations of diplomas and transcripts into Polish/Lithuanian.
